name: Old-Fashioned Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the cabbage and reserve the liquid; set aside 12 large leaves.
2. Shred the remaining cabbage.
3. Mix the meats, rice, egg, and seasonings.
4. Divide the filling among the leaves and make packages by folding in the sides.
5. Saute onion and parsley in 2 tablespoons butter.
6. Stir in the tomato sauce and 1 cup of the reserved cabbage liquid into a Dutch oven.
7. Place half the tomato mixture into the Dutch oven.
8. Put cabbage rolls into the Dutch oven, seam side down.
9. Top with sauerkraut and shredded cabbage.
10. Dot with 2 tablespoons butter; pour the remaining tomato mixture over all.
11. Cover and simmer for 2-2.5 hours.
12. Serve with sour cream if desired (makes 6 servings).
